# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: Explore District 01: City Map and Walking Features Live!
- Summary: Dive into District 01 with our latest updates! We've enhanced the CityMap and CityScene components, adding mobile shell visibility management and improved walking interactions. Explore the new cyberpunk city!
- Slug: city-map-and-walking-features
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated

## Brief

- Core message: The CityMap and CityScene components have been updated with enhanced scene management and mobile shell visibility. Users can now experience improved walking interactions within District 01, bringing the cyberpunk aesthetic to life.
- CTA: Explore District 01 on CodeGrind now!
- Visual brief: A screenshot or stylized graphic showcasing the cyberpunk city environment of District 01, highlighting interactive elements or the avatar moving through the scene.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.

CodeGrind Update: Explore District 01 with Enhanced City Map and Walking Features!

We've significantly updated the CityMap and CityScene components, introducing mobile shell visibility management and refining walking interactions. These enhancements bring the cyberpunk aesthetic of District 01 to life, offering a more immersive experience.

Key improvements include:
- Enhanced scene management for CityMap and CityScene.
- Improved mobile shell visibility.
- More intuitive walking interactions.

Dive into the detailed cyberpunk world of District 01 and discover the latest advancements. Explore District 01 on CodeGrind now!
